title: onosma helvetica
intro: Onosma helvetica, also known as Yellow Toadflax or Hound's Tongue, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, primarily attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Onosma helvetica has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin infections, thanks to its health benefits like expectorant, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in capsule or powder form for medicinal purposes.
